caption: Big-4 implied Lerner index. (a) Monthly median per firm with regime shading: descriptive time profile. (b) Regime contrasts vs pre-IDA reference, conditional on clearing-price-bin fixed effects, with 95% CIs. The price-bin control is the cleanest available control for the low-price seasonal artefact that mechanically inflates the static-FOC Lerner formula. Endesa (GE) and Iberdrola (IB) show DA60/ID15 elevation of +0.318 and +0.135 above pre-IDA at matched prices (p<0.001), with partial reversal at MTU15-DA (GE +0.080, IB −0.028). Naturgy (GN) and HC-Energía (HC) show small or below-baseline contrasts across all post-reform regimes, dominated by bilateral-contract reallocation at the March 2025 Rule 28.8 elimination, not by strategic bidding.
